item.title: OCaml Weekly News, 14 Apr 2026
item.description:
1. Call for presentations: Caml in the Capital II
  2. List your open OCaml positions on the OCaml.org job board
  3. YAMLx: pure-OCaml YAML 1.2/1.1 library
  4. ocaml-letsencrypt, an OCaml way to get TLS certificates
  5. New release of OCaml LSP 1.26.0 and Merlin 5.7.0-504
  6. OCaml YAML library
  7. I18n 5.0 — Internationalisation made easy for any OCaml app
  8. ATD 4.1.0 - now with YAML support
